business.name: Juan Carpenter Inc
business.tagline: Precision Carpentry for Balch Springs Homes & Businesses
business.hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM

seo.title: Juan Carpenter Inc | Expert Carpenter in Balch Springs, TX | Custom Woodwork
seo.description: Juan Carpenter Inc offers expert carpentry services in Balch Springs, TX. From custom cabinets to deck building, we deliver precision and quality. Call (469) 347-5443 for a free estimate.

hero.headline: Custom Carpentry That Transforms Your Space
hero.subheadline: From bespoke cabinets to elegant decks, we craft woodwork that adds beauty and value to your home.

featureSections.title: Built-in Cabinets That Maximize Storage & Style
featureSections.body: Our custom cabinets are designed to fit your space perfectly, offering both functionality and aesthetic appeal. We use premium hardwoods and finishes to create pieces that last a lifetime.
bullets: Wide range of wood species and finishes
featureSections.cardBody: Meet with our team to discuss your vision and get expert advice on materials and design.

featureSections.title: Decks & Patios Built for Texas Weather
featureSections.body: Enjoy your outdoor space year-round with a custom deck or pergola. We use weather-resistant materials and construction techniques that withstand the heat and humidity.
bullets: Permitting and inspection handled for you
featureSections.cardBody: We stand behind our work with a lifetime guarantee on all structural carpentry.

whyChooseUs.title: Locally Owned & Operated
whyChooseUs.description: We're proud to serve Balch Springs and surrounding communities. Our reputation is built on word-of-mouth referrals.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Materials Only
whyChooseUs.description: We source premium hardwoods, composites, and hardware to ensure your project stands the test of time.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: You'll receive a detailed written estimate with no hidden fees. We believe in honest communication.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful Service
whyChooseUs.description: We treat your home with care, covering floors and cleaning up daily. Our team is professional and courteous.

testimonials.quote: Juan and his team built custom bookshelves for our living room. The craftsmanship is incredible, and they finished ahead of schedule.
testimonials.author: Maria G.

testimonials.quote: We hired Juan Carpenter for a deck replacement. The quality is outstanding, and they cleaned up every nail and wood chip. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Tom R.

testimonials.quote: They installed new kitchen cabinets and transformed the whole feel of our home. Professional, punctual, and reasonably priced.
testimonials.author: Lisa K.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From concept to completion, Juan Carpenter Inc provides expert carpentry services in Balch Springs, TX. Whether you need custom furniture, kitchen remodeling, or outdoor structures, we bring precision and passion to every project.

services.title: Custom Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Design and build cabinets that fit your space and style perfectly.
services.longDescription: Our custom cabinetry service covers everything from kitchen and bathroom cabinets to built-in entertainment centers and home offices. We work with you to select materials, finishes, and hardware that match your vision and budget.
benefits: Premium materials like solid oak, maple, and cherry

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We meet on-site to measure, discuss your needs, and create a 3D design.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: Choose from a wide range of woods, stains, and hardware options.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: Our team builds and installs with precision, ensuring a perfect fit and finish.

faqs.question: How long does a custom cabinet project take?
faqs.answer: Typical projects take 4-6 weeks from design to installation, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Can you match existing cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can match stains and styles to blend with your current cabinetry.

services.title: Deck & Patio Building
services.shortDescription: Create an outdoor oasis with a custom deck or pergola.
services.longDescription: We design and build decks, patios, pergolas, and gazebos that enhance your outdoor living space. Using durable materials like cedar, composite, and pressure-treated lumber, we ensure your structure withstands the elements.
benefits: Custom designs to fit any yard size

process.title: Site Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your yard, check for permits, and discuss design ideas.

process.title: Design & Material Choice
process.description: We create a detailed plan and help you select materials and features.

process.title: Construction & Cleanup
process.description: Our crew builds efficiently and leaves your property spotless.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits?
faqs.answer: Yes, we obtain all necessary permits for your deck or patio project.

faqs.question: What is the best material for Texas weather?
faqs.answer: Composite decking is highly recommended for its durability and low maintenance in our climate.

services.title: Trim & Crown Molding
services.shortDescription: Add elegance and character with professional trim work.
services.longDescription: Our trim and molding services include baseboards, crown molding, wainscoting, and custom millwork. We ensure precise miters and seamless joints that elevate the look of any room.

process.title: Measurement & Design
process.description: We measure your rooms and recommend molding styles that complement your home.

process.title: Material Preparation
process.description: We select and pre-cut materials for a smooth installation.

process.title: Installation & Caulking
process.description: We install with precision, fill gaps, and touch up paint for a flawless finish.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate existing profiles to ensure consistency throughout your home.

faqs.question: How much does crown molding cost?
faqs.answer: Cost varies by material and complexity. We provide a free estimate after measuring.

services.title: Furniture & Built-ins
services.shortDescription: Custom furniture and built-in shelving for any room.
services.longDescription: From custom dining tables to built-in bookcases and window seats, we create unique pieces that fit your space and style. Our furniture is built with joinery techniques that ensure durability and beauty.
benefits: Choice of wood, finish, and design

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We discuss your needs, style preferences, and take measurements.

process.title: Building & Finishing
process.description: We craft your piece in our workshop using traditional joinery and premium finishes.

process.title: Delivery & Installation
process.description: We deliver and install your furniture, ensuring it fits perfectly.

faqs.question: Can you build furniture from a photo?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We can replicate or adapt designs from photos or sketches.

faqs.question: What woods do you recommend for furniture?
faqs.answer: Hardwoods like oak, walnut, and maple are ideal for durability and beauty.

about.headline: Crafting Quality Since 2008
about.mission: To provide Balch Springs with exceptional carpentry that combines traditional craftsmanship with modern techniques.
story: Juan Carpenter Inc started as a small operation with a single truck and a passion for woodworking. Over the years, we've grown into a trusted name in Balch Springs, known for our attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction.

Every project, whether a simple repair or a full custom build, receives the same dedication. We believe in using the best materials, respecting deadlines, and leaving every space better than we found it.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in precise cuts, strong joints, and beautiful finishes.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, clear communication, and standing behind our work.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your vision drives every decision we make.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support Balch Springs and its residents by providing reliable, local service.

contact.headline: Let's Build Something Together
contact.subheadline: Contact us for a free estimate and consultation.
